name: Assisted Ascension Module (Armor)
description: Not everyone is born with secrets carving canyons in their mind. Those without sublimation would fester in hylic darkness—our revolution stands apart. Those who have risen through the veil bring back patterns, sounds, scents from a higher plane. On the old Earth, we imbue these relics into fabric and metal, to train the infant nous to recognize Truth until it is ready to do so on its own.
effect: The user always has Aegis:1 and cannot lose their last stack of Aegis.

name: Expanded Aggression Rituals (Armor)
description: The spirits of long forgotten hunter-gods can be harnessed via epigenetic memory extraction to turn one into a maelstrom of primeval violence.
effect: Use your Support Action to extend your Provoke range to Range:2 until the end of your next turn.

name: Soter Assisted Defense System (Weapon)
description: Gnosis is carried by the light, and the light is the Word. The Beast carried with it the Word, and we pass this on to the unthinking world in turn. To bathe in this light, to speak the Word, is to be beyond invincible.
effect: Whenever you spend your entire turn attacking enemies without moving, the tile where your character is standing becomes Cover for as long as you're standing in it.

name: Angelweight Optimization (Armor)
description: Nothing weighs less than nothing, but this aeonic matter is so concentrated with non-hylic material that the old incantations break down. Energy exceeds the Einstein barrier and loops back around in a paracausal floating point error. An ounce of this stuff repels gravity's grasping hands. A pound can turn you inside out.
effect: At Elevation 3 you can move up to 2 spaces for every Speed you spend.

name: Spiked Shoulders (Armor)
description: Adorning your armor with barbed protrusions serves as a display of brutal war trophies while significantly increasing the lethality of close-quarters impacts.
effect: When an adjacent enemy damages you with a melee attack, deal 1 damage to them.

name: Weighted Push (Armor)
description: Intention precedes essence. To become immovable, simply become immovable. To move the immovable, it is enough to simply declare it movable.
effect: You can Shove targets of Scale:2 or Scale:3 up to 2 spaces. You can Shove Scale:1 characters up to 3 spaces.

name: Leviathan-Eyed Consecration Protocol (Weapon)
description: Like children on the beach, we first learned to walk in the footprints of our tormentor gods: wells of energy pulsing through non-hylic directions. Now, we make our own footprints.
effect: At the end of your turn, place a Blast:2 square somewhere within Range:3. Make a note of this but do not draw it on the map or indicate it to the GM. If any creature enters this space, interrupt and make an attack with your primary weapon from that enemy's position. The square vanishes after this attack. You may communicate the overwatch square's location to your allies however you wish.

name: Weapon Link (Weapon)
description: The first obstacle standing between HELLPIERCERS and DIS was the Great Beast Charybdis. It died in seconds, ten thousand years of pent-up spite vaporizing all but a piece of its lower jaw bone.
effect: Your weapons are connected by angel tendons. You can swap weapons once per turn for free.

name: Ablative Pseudo-Soul (Armor)
description: In the hands of a skilled worker, simple nous-stuff can be synthesized from lower-order creatures, such as krill. These pseudo-souls lack consciousness, but will often grow a sense of self. Should it attain synesis, its protectively incorruptible aspects fail—with awareness comes risk.
effect: You have a pool of 5 Temporary HP. This Temporary HP restores at the end of your turn every round. You may share any amount of this Temporary HP with any adjacent target as an Aux Action. Temporary HP takes damage before HP. If you have multiple sources of Temporary HP, you choose the order in which they take damage.
